(TTLU-019-066) A native boatman claimed that during a stay there years before he had seen two Europeans from ships wrecked on the reefs. (TTLU-019-043) It was said the castaways built a third ship on Vanikoro Island, whose fate remains unknown. (TTLU-019-061)

# The Death of Master Zacharius

Dick Sand's promise is recognized early: Captain Hull predicts that the young sailor will one day do honor to the American marine (DSCF-005-025), and entrusts him with duties at the helm during the voyage (DSCF-007-072).
